component.name: NifSkope
component.summary: View and edit NIF 3D model files from Bethesda games

description.p: NifSkope is an open-source tool for opening, viewing, and editing NIF (NetImmerse Format) 3D model files used in games including Morrowind, Oblivion, Skyrim, Fallout 3, Fallout: New Vegas, Fallout 4, Fallout 76, and Starfield.

This package tracks the fo76utils fork (NifSkope 2.0 dev series), which adds Starfield material rendering, glTF import/export, Qt 6 and OpenGL 4 core profile support, advanced Fallout material editing, and batch processing of multiple NIF files.
Note: This is an unofficial third-party Flatpak package. It is not affiliated with or endorsed by the NIF File Format Library and Tools project or the fo76utils project.
Upstream fo76utils fork snapshot — Starfield material rendering, glTF export/import, Qt 6 support, and many Fallout fixes.
